case_title: ALI M. HUDSON VS. THE UNITED COUNCIL OF HUMAN SERVICES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUDSON, ALI M. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HUDSON, ALI M. AS TO DEFENDANT THE UNITED COUNCIL OF HUMAN SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED AUG-04-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE UNITED COUNCIL OF HUMAN SERVICES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUDSON, ALI M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE UNITED COUNCIL OF HUMAN SERVICES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
